headline: Why Tyler Technologies (TYL) Is Up 5.5% After South Carolina’s Statewide ‘Bradley’ AI Assistant Rollout
summary: In late June 2026, Tyler Technologies announced that South Carolina fully rolled out its Resident AI Assistant, “Bradley,” a statewide, multilingual chatbot that directs citizens to verified information across government agencies and has already handled tens of thousands of questions with high first-contact resolution rates. By centralizing access to vehicle, legal, court, and tax information while generating analytics on resident needs, Bradley shows how AI can both enhance service quality...
